no-restricted-globals.name: window
no-restricted-globals.message: core is pure & deterministic: no 'window' in src/core (PRD §6.1/§6.2).

no-restricted-globals.name: Date
no-restricted-globals.message: core is clock-free: no Date in src/core — this bans both `new Date()` and `Date.now` (the save-layer tiebreaker exemption lives in src/persistence). PRD §6.1.

no-restricted-globals.name: performance
no-restricted-globals.message: core is clock-free: no performance.now in src/core (PRD §6.1).

no-restricted-properties.message: core uses the one seeded RNG (core/rng), never Math.random (PRD §6.1).
core bans Math.pow: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.exp: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.expm1: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.log: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.log2: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.log10: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.log1p: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.sin: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.cos: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.tan: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.asin: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.acos: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.atan: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.atan2: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.sinh: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.cosh: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.tanh: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.asinh: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.acosh: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.atanh: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.cbrt: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).
core bans Math.hypot: use integer-pow; only Math.sqrt is whitelisted (PRD §6.1 / Q36).

patterns.message: core may not import from ui/app/persistence — the dependency rule is one-directional (PRD §6.2).
